productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Decade Low Sleek Red Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the women who love the brighter colour palette and a slimmer footwear Fit, the Decade Low Sleek shoe from adidas' Sleek Series collection is a great addition to your fitness wardrobe.UpperLeather upper with a suede overlay on the forefoot, patented leather wraparound at the heel and synthetic leather patented brand stripes on the sides of the midfootPerforations on the midfoot for breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised fitMildly padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the toe guardDo not store in direct sunlight
